productDisplayName: New Hide Men Casual Black Wallet
description: Crafted from soft leather, this leather wallet makes for a great buy. Update your wardrobe with this stylish wallet from new hide and carry your monetary essentials with ease. Dimensions: 11.5 cm x 9 cm Made of genuine leather, has two main compartments Embossed branding on the front with stitch detailing Four credit card slots on either side Two slip pockets for coins and one zippered pocket on the side Care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
